query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime photograph of an urban alley. On the left, a tall building with a window and exterior fixtures runs along the walkway. A wooden utility pole with an illuminated streetlight stands near the center. A car is parked behind a low concrete wall in the lower right. In the background, a single-story building with a row of windows sits in front of a taller multi-story apartment complex. Overhead power lines stretch between structures against the dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime alley scene captured with amateur snapshot energy, showing accidental tilt and casual framing that partially cuts off a car at the lower right edge. The image exhibits exposure extremes, with deep underexposure crushing shadows across the left building and walkway while the streetlight burns out into an overexposed halo, leaving the parked vehicle and background architecture largely obscured. A utility pole with a bright lamp stands between a tall building on the left and a low industrial structure, with a multi-story apartment complex visible beyond it.
